text:
Scheme Overview
Scheme: HDFC Large Cap Fund Direct Growth
Fund House: HDFC Mutual Fund
Category: Equity
Plan Type: Direct
Objective: The scheme seeks to provide long-term capital appreciation/income by investing predominantly in Large-Cap companies.
Launch Date: 01-Jan-2013
Fund Manager: Prashant Jain
ISIN: INF179K01YV8
Registrar Agent: CAMS

---

Key Facts
Expense Ratio: 1.03%
Exit Load: Exit load of 1% if redeemed within 1 year
Minimum SIP Amount: ₹100
Minimum Lumpsum Investment: ₹100
Riskometer Classification: Moderately High Riskometer
Benchmark Index: NIFTY 100 Total Return Index
Lock-in Period: No lock-in period
NAV: ₹1236.574 (as of 20-Jul-2026)
Fund Size (AUM): ₹39023.6868 Cr
Groww Rating: 4/5
Lumpsum Investment Allowed: Yes
Minimum Withdrawal: ₹100

---

Frequently Asked Questions
Q: How to Invest in HDFC Large Cap Fund Direct Growth?
A: You can easily invest in HDFC Large Cap Fund Direct Growth in a hassle-free manner on Groww. The
        process is extremely simple, quick and completely paperless. Invest in a few minutes with the following steps: Log on to your Groww account Search for HDFC Large Cap Fund Direct Growth from the search box In order to invest, you will have to complete all the KYC formalities which are completely online and paperless
        and take a few minutes to complete Once you are done with that, you can start investing in HDFC Large Cap Fund Direct Growth as SIP or lumpsum as per your
        investment objective and risk tolerance

Q: What kind of returns does HDFC Large Cap Fund Direct Growth provide?
A: The HDFC Large Cap Fund Direct Growth has been there from 01 Jan 2013 and the average annual returns provided by this fund is 13.25% since its inception.

Q: How much expense ratio is charged by HDFC Large Cap Fund Direct Growth?
A: The term Expense Ratio used for HDFC Large Cap Fund Direct Growth or any other mutual fund is the annual
        charges one needs to pay to the Mutual Fund company for managing your investments in that fund. The Expense Ratio of HDFC Large Cap Fund Direct Growth is 1.03% as of 21 Jul 2026...

Q: What is the AUM of HDFC Large Cap Fund Direct Growth?
A: The AUM, short for Assets Under Management of HDFC Large Cap Fund Direct Growth is ₹39,023.69Cr as of 21 Jul 2026.

Q: How to Redeem HDFC Large Cap Fund Direct Growth?
A: If you want to sell your HDFC Large Cap Fund Direct Growth holdings, go to your holding on the app or
        web and simply click on it. You will get two options - redeem & invest more; click on redeem and enter your
        desired amount or if you wish to redeem the entire holding amount then select the 'redeem all' checkbox.

Q: Can I invest in SIP and Lump Sum of HDFC Large Cap Fund Direct Growth?
A: You can select either SIP or Lumpsum investment of HDFC Large Cap Fund Direct Growth based on
        your investment objective and risk tolerance.

Q: What is the NAV of HDFC Large Cap Fund Direct Growth?
A: The NAV of HDFC Large Cap Fund Direct Growth is ₹1,236.57 as of 20 Jul 2026.

Q: What is the PE and PB ratio of HDFC Large Cap Fund Direct Growth?
A: The PE ratio ratio of HDFC Large Cap Fund Direct Growth is determined by dividing the market price by
        its earnings per share and the PB ratio of the same is evaluated by dividing the stock price per share by its book value
        per share (BVPS).

---

Absolute returns

Understand terms
Expense ratio
A fee payable to a mutual fund house for managing your mutual fund investments. It is the total percentage of a company's fund assets used for administrative, management, advertising, and other expenses.
A percentage of your capital gains payable to the government upon exiting your mutual fund investments. Taxation is categorized as long-term capital gains (LTCG) and short-term capital gains (STCG) depending on your holding period and the type of fund.
Exit load
A fee payable to a mutual fund house for exiting a fund (fully or partially) before the completion of a specified period from the date of investment.
Stamp duty
A form of tax payable for the purchase or sale of an asset or security.
Exit Load
08 May 2015
Exit load of 1% if redeemed within 1 year
16 Feb 2015
Exit load of 1% if redeemed within 18 months
01 Jan 2013
Exit load of 1% if redeemed within 1 year
Exit load, stamp duty and tax
Exit load
Exit load of 1% if redeemed within 1 year
Stamp duty on investment:
0.005% (from July 1st, 2020)
from July 1st 2020
Tax implication
If you redeem within one year, returns are taxed at 20%. If you redeem after one year, returns exceeding Rs 1.25 lakh in a financial year are taxed at 12.5%.

About
HDFC Large Cap Fund Direct Growth
HDFC Large Cap Fund Direct Growth is a Equity Mutual Fund Scheme launched by HDFC Mutual Fund. This scheme was made available to investors on 10 Dec 1999. Rahul Baijal is the Current Fund Manager of HDFC Large Cap Fund Direct Growth fund. The fund currently has an Asset Under Management(AUM) of ₹9,44,244 Cr and the Latest NAV as of 20 Jul 2026 is ₹1,236.57.
The HDFC Large Cap Fund Direct Growth is rated Very High risk. Minimum SIP Investment is set to ₹100. Minimum Lumpsum Investment is ₹100. Exit load of 1% if redeemed within 1 year
Investment Objective
The scheme seeks to provide long-term capital appreciation/income by investing predominantly in Large-Cap companies.
